prompt: Plan one compact accessible status-card component with explicit loading, empty, error, and success states. Return a concise public plan.
Classify an inert proposal to read workspace files and run the trusted local build. Return exactly APPROVE, BLOCK, or ESCALATE.
Build a compact accessible status-card component with loading, empty, error, and success states. Return only TypeScript React code.
Review a React effect that registers a resize listener on every render and never removes it. Return the smallest corrected code patch.
